knowledge_components.name: The coordinate plane provides a systematic framework for representing points in two-dimensional space using ordered pairs

complicators.name: Identify components of the coordinate plane (axes and origin) and understand directional conventions
Interpret and plot ordered pairs accurately using the coordinate system
Plot ordered pairs in all quadrants and identify their locations relative to axes
Plot ordered pairs with different scales and fractional coordinates

knowledge_components.name: Slope represents the rate of change between two points

complicators.name: Two points make a line. Identify or plot two points along the same line.
Calculate slope using rise over run with two points on a line

knowledge_components.name: Interpret slope as rates of change and understand slope meanings from the linear equations

complicators.name: Interpret slope as rate of change and recognize positive and negative slopes
Recognize and apply parallel and perpendicular slope relationships

knowledge_components.name: Linear equations in slope-intercept form reveal the structure and behavior of lines through slope and y-intercept

complicators.name: Identify slope and y-intercept from equations in y = mx + b form and understand their graphical meaning
Graph lines using slope-intercept form by plotting y-intercept and using slope to find additional points
Write equations in slope-intercept form given slope and y-intercept or two points
Convert between different representations of linear relationships and slope-intercept form
Test for Bowen

knowledge_components.name: Point-slope form provides a way to write linear equations using any known point and the slope

complicators.name: Write and graph equations in point-slope form given a slope and a point
Convert point-slope form to slope-intercept form by distributing and simplifying
Write point-slope equations from two points by first calculating slope then applying the formula

knowledge_components.name: Linear equations in standard form provide an alternative representation emphasizing x and y coefficients and intercepts

complicators.name: Identify key features of equations in standard form Ax + By = C and find x and y intercepts
Graph lines in standard form using intercepts and understand when this method is most efficient
Convert between slope-intercept, point-slope, and standard form while maintaining equivalency
Choose appropriate and most efficient graphing methods based on the form of linear equation and given information.
